title: Sensei Engine Defaults
description: Schema for src/sensei/engine/defaults.yaml — the authoritative tunable surface for the engine. Learner overrides in learner/config.yaml deep-merge on top before validation.

schema_version.description: Defaults schema version. Bump on any field-semantics change.

staleness_minutes.description: Minutes after which the recorded emotional_state is considered stale and re-probed.

degradation_intervention_threshold.description: Earliest emotional state along the degradation chain that triggers an intervention.

staleness_days.description: Days after which the recorded metacognitive_state is considered stale and re-probed.

fading_threshold.description: Metacognitive level at which scaffolding fades to lighter prompts.

learner.description: Learner-side defaults (initial mastery levels, decay rates, etc.). Reserved for future expansion.

curriculum.description: Curriculum graph tunables (consumed by frontier.py, mutate_graph.py, goal protocol).

max_nodes.description: Hard cap on total nodes per goal.

initial_size_min.description: Minimum nodes for initial DAG generation.

initial_size_max.description: Maximum nodes for initial DAG generation.

prior_knowledge_percentile.description: Assumed learner percentile when generating initial curriculum.

frontier_max.description: Max frontier nodes to present as choices.

mastery_threshold.description: Minimum correct/attempts ratio to pass mastery gate.

min_attempts.description: Minimum probes before mastery gate can pass.

max_decompose_children.description: Max subtopics when decomposing a coarse node.

memory.description: Review protocol tunables (consumed by protocols/review.md via decay.py).

stale_threshold.description: Freshness below this is considered stale and due for review.

hints.description: Hint ingestion tunables (consumed by protocols/hints.md via hint_decay.py).

boost_weight.description: Multiplier for hinted topics in curriculum ordering.

max_boost.description: Ceiling on cumulative hint boost per topic.

cluster_threshold.description: Hints in same cluster before suggesting a deep-dive.

expire_after_days.description: Hard cap: expire unacted hints after this many days.

relevance_floor.description: Hints scored below this are auto-marked irrelevant.

cross_goal.description: Cross-goal intelligence tunables (consumed by goal_priority.py, session_allocator.py, review_scheduler.py).

deadline_weight.description: Urgency multiplier for imminent deadlines in goal_priority.py.

min_session_minutes.description: Minimum per-goal time allocation in session_allocator.py. Goals receiving fewer minutes are dropped.

review_dedup.description: Enable cross-goal review deduplication in review_scheduler.py.

concept_dedup.description: Enable concept-aware deduplication (in addition to slug-level) in review_scheduler.py.

interleaving.description: Interleaving tunables (consumed by review_scheduler.py via review protocol).

min_mastery.description: Topics below this mastery score get blocked practice, not interleaved.

session_notes.description: Session notes tunables (consumed by engine.md session-start and session-close).

load_count.description: Number of recent session notes loaded at session start.

max_entries.description: Maximum sessions retained before oldest are retired.

performance_training.description: Performance phase tunables (consumed by protocols/performance-training.md via goal protocol).

mastery_gate.description: Minimum mastery level to enter the performance phase. Ordinal: shaky < developing < solid < mastered.

automate.description: Correct fluent recalls to advance past stage 2.

verbalize.description: Clear verbal explanations to advance past stage 3.

time_pressure.description: Timed problems solved within budget to advance past stage 4.

simulated_eval.description: Scored problems passed under evaluation conditions to advance past stage 5.

full_mock.description: Complete mock events passed to complete the performance phase.
